introSection: Furacão is a roller coaster built by German manufacturer Mack Rides currently located at Aquashow Family Park in Quarteira, Faro, Portugal.

sections.title: Design
sections.content:
The coaster features a swing launch start with a backwards launch, followed by a forwards launch. The ride can either be run for one or two circuits, giving a ride length of or  on the 354 metre track. The ride time is either 90 or 115 seconds giving a theoretical capacity of 640 or 500 people per hour. According to the park CEO on opening the coaster will operate with one circuit of the track per ride.

Riders wear swimwear on the ride, with evacuation routes allowing riders to safely use the coaster in bare feet.

fullText:
Furacão is a roller coaster built by German manufacturer Mack Rides currently located at Aquashow Family Park in Quarteira, Faro, Portugal.

The coaster features a swing launch start with a backwards launch, followed by a forwards launch. The ride can either be run for one or two circuits, giving a ride length of or  on the 354 metre track. The ride time is either 90 or 115 seconds giving a theoretical capacity of 640 or 500 people per hour. According to the park CEO on opening the coaster will operate with one circuit of the track per ride.

Riders wear swimwear on the ride, with evacuation routes allowing riders to safely use the coaster in bare feet.
